== Notes for [[Item:Q57566|Q57566]] ==

Monja en el monasterio de San Idelfonso en Burgos http://riubu.ubu.es/bitstream/10259.4/1088/1/0211-8998_n121_p307-321.pdf (p. 320)

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADBFCC8A1EFBBFA9822EF79916C89FC
geni:6000000081067704998

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
